title: Create Industrial Era
description: This a modpack I made for me and my friends that adds Create + A lot of Create addons and some structure generation.
body:
## [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1351251/description_0da5291a-4d27-4261-aa41-18497275a20e.png)](https://wabbanode.com/affiliate/createindustrialera "Create Server")

## ✨ Create: Industrial Era

This pack is all about **Create** and taking it to the next level. We loaded it up with a ton of Create addons so you and your friends can build crazy factories, flying machines, railways, and pretty much anything you can imagine.

But it’s not just about machines — the world itself is way more fun to explore. There are **new dungeons, towns, temples, and structures** everywhere thanks to YUNG’s mods, Explorify, and a bunch of others. You’ll always have somewhere cool to stumble into when you’re not busy automating your farms.

There’s also a good mix of **food, decoration, and storage mods** (like Farmer’s Delight, Sophisticated Backpacks, and Storage Drawers) so your bases actually feel alive and practical.

We made sure it runs well too — mods like Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and Distant Horizons keep things smooth, even with all the moving contraptions.

Basically:

*   Build huge contraptions.
    
*   Go on adventures.
    
*   Come back and make your world look awesome.
    
*   Repeat.
    

If you’ve ever wanted to live through your own **Industrial Revolution in Minecraft** with friends, this is the pack for it.

[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1351251/description_2f8e8028-3377-48e8-bd86-6545fe8ded26.png)](https://wabbanode.com/affiliate/createindustrialera "Create Server")
